calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Soprep-Matley 225 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioners/Parents, Victor Alonso Samayoa and Maria Rosales, is appearing in propia persona on behalf of the minor child, Diego Fernando Rosales.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Victor Alonso Samayoa and Maria Rosales are sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the minor at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to: DIEGO FERNANDO SAMAYOA. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
